hero.art_prompt: Arjun, a 27 year old Indian man in smart business-casual, confident and hopeful, choosing a management career path on a laptop in a modern home office, aspirational mood.

panels.narration: Arjun was good at his job, but stuck at the same level.
panels.img_prompt: Arjun, 27, in business-casual at his desk, capable but a little restless, looking at a laptop, modern office, thoughtful.

panels.narration: Every role he wanted asked for an MBA he did not have.
panels.img_prompt: Arjun reading a job posting on a laptop that clearly needs a management degree, thoughtful and determined, tidy home office.

panels.narration: Then he found a clear, flexible online MBA.
panels.dialogue: One path, without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Arjun's face lighting up with clarity at a laptop showing a clean online MBA page with specialisations, warm hopeful glow, modern home.

panels.narration: He chose a specialisation and began learning with guidance.
panels.img_prompt: Arjun confidently starting his first online MBA lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm hopeful light.

turn.title: Why Start Your MBA Here
points: Choose from 14 in-demand specialisations, from Finance and HR to Data Science and Marketing.
Study 100% online with weekend live classes, so you keep earning while you learn.
Just ₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
Real AI tools for business, plus mentor support, from your very first semester.

testimonials.name: Arjun Nair
testimonials.quote: I was capable but stuck. A recognised MBA gave me the credential my next role needed.

testimonials.name: Tanvi Shah
testimonials.quote: Choosing my specialisation meant the degree matched the exact career I was building.

testimonials.name: Aditya Kumar
testimonials.quote: Learning real AI and analytics tools from semester one made me job-ready, not just degree-ready.

testimonials.name: Pooja Reddy
testimonials.quote: A recognised MBA, earned online around my job. It opened the door to a leadership role.

facts.v: 14 specialisations across finance, people, data and growth
100% online, weekend live classes, learn while you work
UGC-entitled online MBA, NAAC A++ accredited
